summary: Completed comprehensive testing of crypto gaming platform with TronGrid integration, WebSocket PVP, PWA support, 48% dice win chance, and legal disclaimers. All backend APIs working (28/28 tests passed). Frontend functionality fully operational including authentication, gaming, wallet, referrals, and admin access.
passed_tests: Backend: All 28 API tests passed (100% success rate)
TronGrid worker running and monitoring deposits every 30s
Admin/Demo user login with correct credentials and roles
Dice game with 48% win chance (changed from 10%)
PVP lobby creation with 'waiting' status (no auto-play)
PVP join changes status to 'active' but doesn't auto-play
Admin stats and user management accessible
Landing page loads with hero, CTA, and disclaimer
